properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For the cause of Christ the King We give our lives, an offering ’Til all the earth resounds With ceaseless praise To the Son

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the cause of Christ we go With joy to reap, with faith to sow As many see And many put their trust in the Son

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Christ we proclaim, The Name above every name: For all creation, Ev’ry nation, God’s salvation Through the Son!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the King once lifted high To cries of rage, of ‘crucify!’ Endured the cross As every sin was laid On the Son

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To the King who conquered death To free the poor and the oppressed For lasting peace For life and liberty In the Son

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let it be my life’s refrain: To live is Christ, to die is gain; Deny myself, take up my cross And follow the Son
